title: n2base — Full-Stack Boilerplate

hero.title: Ship your product faster with n2base
hero.subtitle: NestJS API + Next.js frontend — pre-wired with authentication, file uploads, i18n, Swagger, Docker, and CI. Both relational and document databases supported.
